title: Wrap up for this week Trading ideas
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone! Happy Friday. This week looks pretty good in terms of performance. If you following my posts then you've seen a list of trading ideas that I've shared on [Tuesday](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1t4lizg/trade_ideas_for_this_week/). So here is the results:

**Weekly Performance of top 7 stocks in my 4 sector** [strategy](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/103963) **(May 4 – May 8, 2026)**

|Company|Symbol|Entry Target|Recent Price (May 8)|Performance Status|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|**Gen Digital**|NASDAQ:GEN|$18.60|**$22.69**|**Exit Hit ($21.00)**|
|**Avnet**|NASDAQ:AVT|$79.50|**$82.09**|**Holding Above Target**|
|**ZTO Express**|NYSE:ZTO|$24.80|**$25.05**|**Holding Above Target**|
|**Southwest Airlines**|NYSE:LUV|$38.20|**$41.31**|**Holding Above Target**|
|**Douglas Dynamics**|NYSE:PLOW|$44.50|**$45.29**|**Exit Hit earlier ($50.00)**|
|**Ennis, Inc.**|NYSE:EBF|$20.80|**$20.67**|**Testing Entry Level**|
|**Hackett Group**|NASDAQ:HCKT|$12.50|**$10.74**|**Stop Loss Hit ($11.90)**|

  


**Gen Digital Inc (GEN)** rallied significantly on Friday, climbing over 7.5% to close at **$22.69**. This move comfortably cleared $21.00 profit target following its Q4 earnings report.

**The Hackett Group Inc (HCKT)** faced a sharp decline this week, dropping nearly 5% on Friday to end at **$10.74** and triggered **$11.90 stop-loss**, potentially validated by the "Consulting Deferrals" risk identified as sentiment turned bearish following their latest results.

**Douglas Dynamics Inc (PLOW)**, had reached $50.00 profit target earlier in the week, retraced to **$45.29** by Friday's close.

**Avnet Inc (AVT)** and **Southwest Airlines Co (LUV)**  both ended well above their initial entry targets at **$82.09** and **$41.31** respectively.

**Ennis Inc (EBF)** ended the week at **$20.67**, still slightly below $20.80 entry target but showing signs of stability compared to earlier in the week.

I'll post new ideas next week. Have a good weekend 😄

comments.author: Opening-Berry-6041
comments.body: yo this is actually super smart how you break down the actual exit price versus the profit target like for GEN and PLOW, could you explain that a bit more?

replies.author: Magic-Mike-2023
replies.body: My automated strategy picks stocks and adds them to the virtual portfolio. Thats how I get entry price and list of trade ideas. I've set strict stop loss at 9% and take profit targets at 40% in strategy settings. But, to minimize risk I set those targets closer to entry price when I actually buy stocks. I hope I answered your question:)

replies.author: Magic-Mike-2023
replies.body: I also sell the stock if I see that my strategy removed it from the portfolio
